name: Vagabond - COMBAT INITIATION -
description:
(PLAYER ENCOUNTER)

"A wandering knight that shines beneath the moon in the darkness, wielding nothing but a mighty sword."

Vagabond, the third boss in Combat Initiation on Roblox. He's edgy with a sharp edge blade and a plan to destroy you.

This one's made with you as the "player," y'know, the guy running through all the stages.

Hello, creator here! Another one made! This one was done a little earlier than I was originally expecting due to a request, also this one may be a little more.. bland.. due to his lore being limited and unfinished at the moment. As per usual, any problems or quirks THAT ARE DUE TO THE BOT ITSELF will (hopefully) be fixed, as long as you report them in the comments!

GUYS I FUCKED UP VAGABOND WAS CONFIRMED TO BE MUTE AAAAA

So go on and SHRED HIM TO BITS, take out all of that rage! ...or get wholesome or whatever, I mean he wants to kill you but you do you. Also I bashed his head in with a [+SLAM DUNK!!]
creator: Masashlynmune
